services: Fuse Board Upgrades & Consumer Unit Installation

sample_reviews.author: James T.
sample_reviews.text: Called late at night with a burst pipe and Vamos were out within the hour. Professional, tidy and reasonably priced. Couldn't recommend more highly.

sample_reviews.author: Sandra M.
sample_reviews.text: Had both a plumbing and electrical issue at the same time — brilliant to have one company sort everything out. Fast, reliable and great value.

sample_reviews.author: Kieran B.
sample_reviews.text: Used Vamos for a boiler service and some electrical work. Turned up on time, explained everything clearly and got the job done without any fuss. Will use again.

brand.usp: Vamos Plumbing & Electrical Services offers round-the-clock plumbing and electrical solutions across Birmingham, combining two essential trades under one reliable, fully qualified team. Whether it's a midnight emergency or a planned installation, we're always ready to help.
brand.about_paragraph: We are Vamos Plumbing & Electrical Services, a Birmingham-based company built on the belief that essential home repairs shouldn't wait. We operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, handling everything from burst pipes and boiler breakdowns to rewiring and electrical faults. Our qualified team takes pride in arriving promptly, working cleanly, and getting the job done right first time.
